title: Bacterial Transformation Protocol
author: 宏亮 董
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7idhka6
materials: Plate 100 μl for a reaction product.

steps.title: Put DH5α chemically competent bacterium on...
steps.instruction: Put DH5α chemically competent bacterium on ice for melting about 15min.

steps.title: Add 50 μl DH5α chemically competent bacterium into 1
steps.instruction: Add 50 μl DH5α chemically competent bacterium into 1.5 ml tubes, mix with ligation product or digested product thoroughly, incubate the bacterium on ice for 30 min.

steps.title: Heat shock the bacterium for exactly...
steps.instruction: Heat shock the bacterium for exactly 45 s at 42 ℃ water bath.

steps.title: Place back on ice for 2 min
steps.instruction: Place back on ice for 2 min.

steps.title: Add 500 μ l LB medium...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μ l LB medium to each tube, shake the tubes at 37 ℃, 200 rpm for 45 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge the bacterium at 3000r for 3 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the bacterium at 3000r for 3 min.

steps.title: Discard 300 μ l supernatant and resuspend the sediment
steps.instruction: Discard 300 μ l supernatant and resuspend the sediment.

steps.title: Incubate plates upside down overnight at 37℃
steps.instruction: Incubate plates upside down overnight at 37℃.
